basics.name: Suraksha Vinod
basics.label: PhD Student
basics.summary: PhD student in Bioinformatics and Genomics at Penn State with a keen interest in personalized medicine and complex diseases.
basics.interests: Statistical Genetics and Genomics, Personalized Medicine, GxE interactions, Complex Diseases, ML in Biology

education.area: Biotechnology (Minor in Computer Science and Engineering)

experience.name: Georgia Institute of Technology
highlights: Developed a computational pipeline to investigate the influence of ancestry and environment on polygenic scores across five diseases in a diverse WGS cohort of ~10,000 individuals
Integrated DNA methylation data to explore the impact of weathering on the risk profiles

experience.name: M. D. Anderson Cancer Center
highlights: Implemented machine learning models with over 35,000 features to predict the tumor-specific total mRNA expression (TmS) across the lung cancer types
Evaluated the clinical utility of the predicted TmS through survival analysis and GSEA

experience.name: Centre for Brain Research, Indian Institute of Science
highlights: Executed rare-variant specific genome wide association studies (GWAS) utilizing WGS data in a cohort of over 2000 individuals
Developed an extensive, parallelised computational pipeline for downstream analyses

experience.name: Leucine Rich Bio Pvt Ltd
highlights: Explored the implications of gut microbiome on Parkinson's Disease by carrying out Bioinformatics data analysis such as quality control and assembly on Galaxy
Maintained an extensive database of literature on the association of gut microbiome and Parkinson's Disease

publications.name: Machine learning models predict tumor-specific total mRNA expression associated with clinical outcomes across 14 cancer types
publications.publisher: Cancer Research (American Association for Cancer Research)

publications.name: Identifying anti-diabetic potential of alpha-amylase inhibitors in Ocimum basilicum using In vitro and In silico approaches
publications.publisher: Suranaree Journal of Science and Technology

awards.title: Prof. M R Doreswamy Merit Scholarship Award Certificate (x5)
Best Paper Award (at I-SENTIENT)
awards.awarder: School of Sciences at Jain (Deemed-to-be University)
